description: Analyze the Alzheimer's Aβ(1-42) amyloid fibril (PDB: 2BEG) to extract its characteristic cross-beta architecture dimensions. Using ONLY State 1 of the NMR ensemble, measure two critical distances: 1) The inter-strand distance (from Chain A Ile31 CA to Chain B Ile31 CA). 2) The inter-sheet distance within a monomer (from Chain C Val18 CA to Chain C Ile31 CA). Render a publication-quality figure highlighting the multi-chain cross-beta structure and save it to ~/PyMOL_Data/images/amyloid_cross_beta.png. Write a quantitative report to ~/PyMOL_Data/amyloid_dimensions.txt that records these two distance values (in Angstroms) and briefly mentions their structural context.
